_comment: Example general-ABI oracle spec (WS-5 design detail B). Proves the D2MOO reimpl of a function against the live game via POST /oracle. This one is the coord-family DUNGEON_GameToClientCoords -- void __stdcall(int* pX, int* pY) -- expressed generally: two in/out buffer args compared after the call. A fun-doc worker emits specs of this exact shape (name + callconv + args + compare + vectors) from its param_layout/input_sets.
name: DUNGEON_GameToClientCoords
